channel.title: Personal Finance on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Personal Finance on MinWeb

item.title: Why You Feel Behind Financially (And Why You’re Not)
item.description: Stop feeling like you are failing financially by understanding money dysmorphia, the trap of social media comparisons, and the true reality of median wealth.

item.title: Stop Overspending: The "Noticeability Rule" for Purchases
item.description: Stop wasting money on status symbols by using the Noticeability Rule, a simple strategy to curb impulse spending and boost your long-term financial freedom.

item.title: Stuck in an 84-Month Car Loan? How to Escape the Trap
item.description: Stuck in a long-term car loan that has you underwater? Learn why 84-month financing is a financial trap and discover effective strategies to escape the debt.

item.title: Market Dip: Should You Invest or Pay Down Your Mortgage?
item.description: Deciding between investing during a market dip or paying down your mortgage? Use our data-driven guide to determine which move best secures your financial...

item.title: Got a Massive Salary Jump? How to Avoid the Lifestyle Trap
item.description: Stop lifestyle creep after a major salary jump by using the 50% rule to grow your wealth and achieve true financial freedom instead of just higher monthly...

item.title: How to Manage a Massive Salary Jump Without Losing Wealth
item.description: Stop lifestyle creep in its tracks by learning how to manage a significant salary jump effectively and build lasting wealth instead of falling into debt.
